mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, user_id, user_role, action, resource_type, resource_id, before_data, after_data, ip_address, device_info, app_version, trace_id, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_log ( tenant_id, user_id, user_role, action, resource_type, resource_id, before_data, after_data, ip_address, device_info, app_version, trace_id ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{userRole}, #{action}, #{resourceType}, #{resourceId}, #{beforeData, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{afterData, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{ipAddress}, #{deviceInfo}, #{appVersion}, #{traceId} )
